title: Chapter 47
content:
Chapter 47: Chapter 47: The Curse of the Untouchable

Ahena, the Cursed Demoness, floated in the center of the chaos, a queen presiding over a court of ruin. Her ruby-red skin glowed with an internal light, pulsing in time with the moans of the women writhing on the floor beneath her.

She raised a clawed hand, pointing a long, obsidian finger directly at Kai.

"Drain yourself," she commanded.

Her voice wasn’t just sound; it was a psychic hook. It dug into the base of the spine, trying to bypass logic and hotwire the nervous system.

Strings of pink, luminescent light uncoiled from her body like seeking vipers. They swirled around Kai, caressing his chest, his arms, and circling his groin. They whispered promises of unimaginable pleasure, urging him to drop his pants, to grip himself, to join the chorus of the damned.

"Give me your sexual energy," Ahena purred, her yellow eyes narrowing as she focused her will. "Feel the pleasure of stroking your cock. Don’t stop yourself. Look at them... look at how much they enjoy it."

She gestured grandly to Han Rou and Yun Xi. The teacher was gasping for air, her hand a blur of motion between her legs, while the student was sobbing in ecstasy, her body arching off the floor.

"See how the other cultivators are masturbating?" Ahena mocked. "It is the purest form of worship. You should also do the same. Be a good boy and spill your seed for me."

Kai stood like a statue amidst the swirling magic. The pink strings brushed against his mental defenses and shattered. His

[Supreme Yang Physique] was a roaring furnace that burned away the subtle influence of her Yin magic.

He didn’t reach for his belt. He didn’t glaze over. He just crossed his arms, his biceps bulging against his uniform, and smirked.

"I’m not like other cultivators," Kai said, his voice cutting through the haze of lust like a cold blade.

The pink strings fizzled out and vanished before they could touch his skin.

Ahena paused. Her tail flicked behind her in irritation, disturbing the stagnant air. She looked at him with a mixture of confusion and genuine curiosity.

"I see that," she murmured, lowering her hand. "You have... a dense soul. Very well."

She smiled, a slow, predatory curving of her black lips that revealed sharp, white fangs.

"I like it. A challenge is rare in this realm. But don’t worry, human. Even if you don’t give me your energy freely... I already have plenty of livestock."

She inhaled deeply, the glowing streams of light from the four women flowing into her open, wet pussy, feeding her strength.

"I am impressed, though," Ahena admitted, floating slightly lower until she was hovering just a foot above him. "That a human can see me... and is not affected by my presence. Most men would have ejaculated in their trousers the moment I revealed my true form."

"You think highly of yourself," Kai replied dryly.

"I am Ahena," she announced, placing a hand on her ample, naked breast. "A Demoness of the High Court. But... I am an exile."

Her expression shifted. The arrogance cracked for a split second, revealing a deep, ancient bitterness.

"I was cursed," Ahena spat, the words dripping with venom. "In my world, I was a queen of desire. But a jealous rival placed a binding on my soul. I am cursed to never know the touch of a lover. I cannot have sex. I cannot feel the warmth of flesh inside me."

She looked down at her own body—perfection sculpted from sin—with a look of hatred.

"I came to this mortal realm to survive. I need sex to be alive. It is my food, my oxygen. But because of the curse... no one can fuck me. Any mortal who tries to enter me burns to ash. Any demon who touches me with lust withers away."

She spread her legs wide in the air, displaying the source of her power and her torment. Her pussy was swollen, glistening, and inviting, yet it was a void that could never be filled.

"That is why I created this domain," Ahena explained, her voice regaining its haughty tone. "I take away the sexual energy from draining people with their own desires. I force them to pleasure themselves until they are empty husks. I feed on the friction I can never feel. I survive on the echoes of their orgasms."

She laughed, a chilling, harmonic sound that made the windows rattle.

"And now, look at your friends. They are close to the break. In a few minutes, their life force will belong to me completely."

She waved her hand dismissively at Kai.

"Now you should go, kiddo. Run along. There is nothing you can do here. You cannot fight me, and you cannot touch me. Leave, before you have to watch them drain themselves to death for my amusement."

Kai didn’t move toward the door. He took a step forward.

"You talk too much," Kai said.

Ahena rolled her eyes. "Foolish. Do you wish to die? I told you, I am untouchable. I am a spirit of pure Yin energy. Your physical hands will pass right through me."

Kai took another step. He was right in front of her now. He was tall, but she was floating higher, her groin level with his chest.

"A curse to never have sex?" Kai murmured, looking up at her. The

Dragon’s Vitality within him roared to life, sensing a conquest that defied the laws of nature. "And you think that applies to me?"

"It applies to all," Ahena sneered. "I am a phantom to you. A dream you cannot grasp."

Kai didn’t use a spell. He didn’t use a talisman. He summoned the raw, crushing weight of his

Level 4 Stats and infused his hand with the aggressive, rule-breaking energy of his System.

He reached out.

Ahena didn’t dodge. She watched with amusement, waiting for his hand to phase through her ruby skin like smoke.

It didn’t.

Kai’s hand broke the spiritual barrier. His solid, warm flesh connected with her ethereal form.

Zap.

A shockwave of heat exploded from the point of contact.

Ahena gasped, her yellow eyes widening to the size of saucers. Her body went rigid in the air.

Kai didn’t stop at a touch. He slid his hand right between her floating, spread thighs. He cupped her mound. It was hot—hotter than fire—and incredibly wet.

He pressed his middle finger directly against her clitoris.

Rub.

He dragged his finger over the sensitive pearl, treating the Demoness like a common harem girl.

"Ah!" Ahena let out a strangled, shocked cry. "You... you can touch...?"

Kai kept his hand there, claiming her, grounding her spiritual form into reality with his grip. He looked up, locking his dark gaze with her terrified, bewildered eyes.

He smirked, a cruel, dominant smile that promised ruin.

"That’s what you think, bitch."
